name: Supertrend RSI Pullback Timing
edge_hypothesis: Supertrend is the #1 PPR family in the promoted library (PPR 4.47, 4.18, 4.09 — 3 of top 10 promoted). RSI pullback timing has standalone validated edge (PF 1.442, 156 trades, ACCEPT). The hypothesis: vanilla Supertrend enters on direction flip, which often occurs at trend extremes (worst possible entry price). By adding RSI pullback timing — entering when RSI recovers from near-oversold within a Supertrend-confirmed uptrend — we get cheaper entries while maintaining Supertrend's superior trend signal. Supertrend adapts to volatility via ATR-based trailing, making it more robust than fixed EMA trend signals. This should improve PF over vanilla Supertrend by reducing entry price while maintaining the same exit framework.

variants.name: supertrend_rsi_pullback_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: Supertrend uptrend (d=1) + RSI recovering from near-oversold (crosses above 35). Enter when pullback completes within confirmed trend. 8:1 R:R. RSI 35 is slightly above classic oversold (30) to catch more pullback completions.

components.notes: Supertrend direction — #1 PPR family (4.47). ATR-adaptive trailing provides robust trend signal.
RSI crossing above 35 times pullback completion. Slightly above classic 30 to capture more entries on 4h.
ATR-based position sizing and 8:1 R:R framework.

variants.name: supertrend_rsi_pullback_v2_deep_8to1
variants.description: Deeper pullback variant: RSI must cross above 30 (classic oversold exit). Fewer but higher-quality entries — only triggers after genuine capitulation within Supertrend uptrend. Tests whether waiting for deeper pullbacks improves PF vs the relaxed v1 threshold.

components.notes: Classic RSI 30 oversold exit — deep pullback entry timing.

variants.name: supertrend_rsi_pullback_v3_extended_10to1
variants.description: Extended TP variant of v1: 10:1 R:R (15x ATR TP). Supertrend's ATR-adaptive trailing identifies sustained trends — if RSI pullback entry provides cheaper prices, the extended TP should capture larger moves from the better entry point.

components.notes: Supertrend direction for sustained trend identification.
RSI 35 pullback timing — enter at cheaper prices for extended TP.
Extended 15x ATR TP for trend continuation.

indicator_roles.baseline: SUPERTd_7_3.0 — ATR-adaptive trend direction, #1 PPR family (4.47) in promoted library
indicator_roles.confirmation: RSI_14 — pullback timing via oversold zone exit, enters at cheaper prices within confirmed trends
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework
